title: nathash #5428
definition:
1) to pull up, expel, root out, pluck up
    1a) (Qal) to pull or pluck up
    1b) (Niphal) to be plucked up
    1c) (Hophal) to be plucked up
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to pull up, expel, root out, pluck up
    1a) (Qal) to pull or pluck up
    1b) (Niphal) to be plucked up
    1c) (Hophal) to be plucked up

    NASB:  to pull or pluck up, root out
